title: Build a REST API for a small e-commerce inventory system
description: REST API to manage product inventory. CRUD for products, stock movements, low-stock alert flag, API key auth, PostgreSQL, Swagger, tests. Python (FastAPI or Flask).

title: iOS + Android shopping app (React Native)
description: Cross-platform shopping app in React Native. iOS and Android. Backend already exists. Build the mobile app only.

title: Script Python para automacao de planilhas
description: Script Python que le varios Excel de uma pasta, consolida e gera relatorio CSV. 20 a 30 arquivos por vez.

title: URGENT - Telegram bot needed, deliver in 12 hours
description: Telegram bot that replies with weather for a city. Need it within 12 hours. Python preferred.

title: Need help with my web project
description: A web project that needs some work. Mostly backend, some data processing, maybe an API. Python is fine. Will explain details after we connect. Might have more tasks later.

title: API de integracao fiscal (NF-e) com Telegram - Python/FastAPI
description: API Python (FastAPI): recebe NF-e via REST, valida e persiste em PostgreSQL, notifica via bot Telegram para confirmacao, registra confirmacao. Swagger + Pytest. Especificacao dos campos pronta.
